Import data using Pandas and filter for Miami properties. Calculate mean, median, and standard deviation for rental prices. Segment data by property types for detailed insights.  
* * *  
Identify outliers using Z-score method and IQR technique. Visualize results with Seaborn boxplots for clarity. Compare price distributions across property types.  
* * *  
Create a Matplotlib histogram to show rental price frequency. Highlight outliers in the visualization for better understanding. Ensure all data is properly cleaned and structured.
